description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical bottle with a rounded rectangular profile and a smooth, matte white exterior. The bottle features a prominent blue cap on one end, which appears to be a screw cap based on its shape and placement. On the opposite side of the cap, the bottle is fully closed and rounded, with no visible openings. A molded handle is integrated into the side of the bottle, providing an ergonomic grip for carrying or pouring. The surface of the bottle is unadorned, with no visible labels, logos, or text. The overall design suggests it is intended for holding liquids, such as water, detergent, or other household fluids.
description: A smooth, matte white bottle with a blue screw cap and an integrated side handle, designed for carrying liquids. The bottle is unmarked and has a rounded, ergonomic shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, white body and the blue cap on the right end.
description_view_1: End view focused on the blue cap, with the handle partially visible on the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle clearly and the blue cap on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded, closed end of the bottle and the handle on the left.
